prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat-Abarth 2.0L 16V 'Lampredi' (engine code: 200A4.000) with forged internals (JE Pistons 87.5mm, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with a 4-2-1 header design for optimized scavenging

Full standalone Motec M150 ECU with custom lambda control, individual cylinder fuel trims, and a dual-stage nitrous oxide system (NOS 5176) for on-demand 100hp shots, calibrated specifically for the 200A4.000’s 11.5:1 compression ratio

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with custom valving for the 130 Coupe’s unique MacPherson strut front and semi-trailing arm rear suspension, paired with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm) and a Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Zender (originally designed for the 130 Coupe in the 1970s) with bolt-on fender flares, extended rocker panels, and a bespoke carbon fiber front splitter by Capristo, reinforced with aluminum honeycomb for rigidity

Full retrim of the interior in Alcantara (Rosso Corsa) with custom Recaro SPG XL seats (Fiat 130 Coupe-specific mounting brackets) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm diameter) wrapped in perforated leather, retaining the original woodgrain dashboard trim

Bespoke 3-piece OZ Racing Ultraleggera wheels (17x8.5 ET25 front, 17x10 ET35 rear) with custom offsets to fill the Zender flares, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (225/45/17 front, 275/40/17 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers and 355mm two-piece rotors up front
